assertions.title: Agent skill snapshots use only renamed canonical skill keys

steps.action: POST the fixture agent skill sync endpoint with the canonical renamed bundled skill key.
steps.expected: The response desiredSkills and entry keys/runtime names use only renamed canonical Papierklammer identity values.

evidence.filesystem: Observed via sync response only; no legacy paperclip keys or runtime names were present.
evidence.legacyTokenCheck: No desired skill key, entry key, or runtimeName matched the legacy Paperclip token family.

assertions.title: `agent local-cli` installs only renamed local skill directories

steps.action: Run `pnpm --dir ... papierklammer agent local-cli ... --json` with isolated CODEX_HOME and CLAUDE_HOME.
steps.expected: The installer links only renamed skill directories into both homes.

steps.action: Re-run the same local-cli install against the same isolated homes.
steps.expected: The rerun keeps only renamed directories and does not revive legacy `paperclip*` names.

evidence.filesystem: CODEX_HOME/skills and CLAUDE_HOME/skills both matched repo bundled skill dirs ['papierklammer', 'papierklammer-create-agent', 'papierklammer-create-plugin', 'para-memory-files'] on both runs.
evidence.legacyTokenCheck: No installed directory in either isolated home began with `paperclip` after run 1 or run 2.

assertions.title: Active bundled and project worker skill files are renamed in place

steps.action: Scan all active markdown files under `skills/` and `.factory/skills/`, extracting rename-relevant frontmatter, headings, and example/instruction lines.
steps.expected: The active bundled and worker skill surfaces expose only Papierklammer naming in those extracted lines.
steps.observed: Scanned 15 markdown files and extracted 275 rename-relevant lines; legacyHits=[]

evidence.legacyTokenCheck: No extracted heading/frontmatter/example/instruction line matched `Paperclip` or `paperclipai`.

assertions.title: Skill discovery, served markdown, and local installer agree on renamed skill identity

steps.expected: HTTP discovery and served markdown expose the renamed `papierklammer` slug and identity.

steps.action: Install local CLI skills into isolated CODEX_HOME and CLAUDE_HOME, then sync the fixture agent skill snapshot.
steps.expected: Installer output, installed directories, and the agent snapshot align on the same renamed bundled skill identity.

evidence.filesystem: HTTP slug `papierklammer`, installed dir `papierklammer`, and snapshot runtimeName `papierklammer` all aligned; desiredSkills included `papierklammer/papierklammer/papierklammer`.
evidence.legacyTokenCheck: No legacy Paperclip token appeared in the discovery response, served markdown identity lines, installer dir names, or synced snapshot identity fields.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: VAL-SKILLS-003=pass, VAL-SKILLS-005=pass, VAL-SKILLS-006=pass, VAL-CROSS-001=pass.
